title: BPA Disbursement Request
description: Batch Payments for Agents (BPA) 1.0 — request object for a single logical batch disbursement. See the BPA 1.0 specification, section 4.

idempotency_key.description: Unique key per logical batch. Replays with the same key MUST NOT initiate a second settlement (BPA §5).

chain.description: CAIP-2 chain identifier. Core rails: 'eip155:8453' (Base), 'eip155:1' (Ethereum), 'solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp' (Solana mainnet).

asset.description: Token contract address (EVM), mint (Solana), or native symbol (e.g. 'ETH').

trigger.description: When the batch settles. Defaults to 'immediate' if omitted.

condition_ref.description: Stable, independently verifiable reference to the gating condition. REQUIRED when type = 'on_condition' (BPA §8).

recipients.description: Ordered set of payout lines. At least one. The reference Base/Ethereum contract caps a single call at 200; larger batches MUST be chunked under one idempotency_key (BPA §4).

address.description: Recipient address on the named chain.

amount.description: Amount in the asset's base units, as an integer string (no decimals/floats).

ref.description: Optional caller-supplied line id, echoed in per-recipient results.

policy_ref.description: Optional id of the policy to evaluate before settlement (BPA §10).
